title: ReDoc Configuration
description: Configuration options for ReDoc, the open-source API documentation renderer for OpenAPI specifications. These options control the functional behavior, appearance, and theme of the rendered documentation.

disableSearch.description: Disables search indexing and hides the search box from the API documentation page.

minCharacterLengthToInitSearch.description: Sets the minimum number of characters that need to be typed into the search dialog to initiate the search.

hideDownloadButtons.description: Hides the Download button for saving the API definition source file. This setting does not make the API definition private; it just hides the button.

hideLoading.description: Hides the loading animation. Does not apply to CLI or Workflows-rendered docs.

hideSchemaTitles.description: Hides the schema title next to the type.

oneOf.description: A numeric level to expand JSON payload samples to.
Expand all levels of JSON payload samples.

jsonSamplesExpandLevel.description: Sets the default expand level for JSON payload samples (response and request body). The default value is 2. Use 'all' to expand all levels.

maxDisplayedEnumValues.description: Displays only the specified number of enum values. Remaining values are hidden in an expandable area. If not set, all values are displayed.

onlyRequiredInSamples.description: Shows only required fields in request samples.

sortRequiredPropsFirst.description: Shows required properties in schemas first, ordered in the same order as in the required array.

oneOf.description: A numeric level to auto-expand schemas to.
Expand all schemas regardless of their level.

schemasExpansionLevel.description: Specifies whether to automatically expand schemas in Reference docs. Set to 'all' to expand all schemas, or a number to expand schemas up to that level. Default is 0 (no expansion).

oneOf.description: A fixed number of pixels to be used as the vertical scroll offset.
A CSS selector for an element whose bottom edge defines the scroll offset.

scrollYOffset.description: Specifies a vertical scroll-offset. Useful when fixed positioned elements (such as navbars or headers) are at the top of the page.

oneOf.description: When true, shows all specification extensions (x- fields). Extensions used by Redoc are ignored.
An array of extension names to selectively display.

showExtensions.description: Shows specification extensions (x- fields). Can be a boolean or an array of extension names.

sanitize.description: If set to true, the API definition is considered untrusted and all HTML/Markdown is sanitized to prevent XSS.

downloadUrls.description: Set the URLs used to download the OpenAPI description or other documentation-related files from the API documentation page.

schemaDefinitionsTagName.description: If a value is set, all schemas are rendered with the designated tag name and displayed in the sidebar navigation.

generatedSamplesMaxDepth.description: Controls how many schema levels are automatically generated for payload samples.

hidePropertiesPrefix.description: Enables hiding of parent names for nested properties within the documentation in complex data structures.

expandDefaultServerVariables.description: Enables or disables expanding default server variables.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated HTTP response codes to expand, or 'all' to expand all responses.

expandResponses.description: Controls which responses to expand by default. Specify response codes as a comma-separated list (e.g. '200,201') or use 'all' to expand all.

expandSingleSchemaField.description: Automatically expands the single field in a schema.

hideHostname.description: If set to true, the protocol and hostname are not shown in the operation definition.

hideOneOfDescription.description: If set to true, the description for oneOf/anyOf objects is not shown in the schema.

hideSchemaPattern.description: If set to true, the pattern is not shown in the schema.

hideSingleRequestSampleTab.description: Hides the request sample tab for requests with only one sample.

menuToggle.description: If set to true, selecting an expanded item in the sidebar twice collapses it.

nativeScrollbars.description: If set to true, the sidebar uses the native scrollbar instead of perfect-scroll. A scrolling performance optimization for large API definitions.

pathInMiddlePanel.description: Shows the path link and HTTP verb in the middle panel instead of the right panel.

payloadSampleIdx.description: If set, the payload sample is inserted at the specified index. Indexes start from 0.

showObjectSchemaExamples.description: Shows object schema example in the properties.

showWebhookVerb.description: When set to true, shows the HTTP request method for webhooks in operations and in the sidebar.

simpleOneOfTypeLabel.description: Shows only unique oneOf types in the label without titles.

sortEnumValuesAlphabetically.description: When set to true, sorts all enum values in all schemas alphabetically.

sortOperationsAlphabetically.description: When set to true, sorts operations in the navigation sidebar and in the middle panel alphabetically.

sortPropsAlphabetically.description: When set to true, sorts properties in all schemas alphabetically.

sortTagsAlphabetically.description: When set to true, sorts tags in the navigation sidebar and in the middle panel alphabetically.

untrustedSpec.description: If set to true, the API definition is considered untrusted and all HTML/Markdown is sanitized to prevent XSS.

theme.description: Theme and visual styling options for the API documentation page.

DownloadUrl.description: A URL entry for downloading an OpenAPI description or related documentation file.

url.description: The URL pointing to the downloadable file.

title.description: A human-readable label for the download link.

ThemeOptions.description: Visual theme configuration for the Redoc documentation renderer.

spacing.description: Spacing and padding settings used in the layout.

breakpoints.description: Breakpoints for switching between three-panel, two-panel, and mobile view layouts.

colors.description: Color settings including tonal offset and primary/secondary palette.

typography.description: Typography settings including font family, size, weight, and line height.

sidebar.description: Sidebar width, background color, text color, and item styling.

logo.description: Logo display settings including max dimensions and padding.

rightPanel.description: Right panel background color, width, text color, and server display options.

SpacingOptions.description: Spacing configuration for the Redoc layout.

unit.description: Main spacing unit (in pixels) used in auto-computed theme values.

sectionHorizontal.description: Horizontal section padding in pixels. Defaults to spacing.unit * 8.

sectionVertical.description: Vertical section padding in pixels. Defaults to spacing.unit * 8.

small.description: Breakpoint for switching to mobile view.

medium.description: Breakpoint for switching to two-panel view.

large.description: Breakpoint for switching to three-panel view.

ColorOptions.description: Color palette settings for the Redoc theme.

tonalOffset.description: Default tonal offset used in color computations.

TypographyOptions.description: Typography settings for the Redoc documentation.

fontSize.description: Base font size for body text.

lineHeight.description: Base line height for body text.

optimizeSpeed.description: Whether to optimize text rendering for speed.

code.description: Typography settings for inline code blocks.

wrap.description: Whether to break word for inline blocks (otherwise they can overflow).

LinkTypographyOptions.description: Typography and color settings for hyperlinks.

color.description: Link text color. Defaults to the primary color.

visited.description: Visited link color. Defaults to the link color.

hover.description: Hover link color. Defaults to a lightened version of the link color.

hoverTextDecoration.description: CSS text-decoration for links on hover.

SidebarOptions.description: Styling and layout options for the navigation sidebar.

activeTextColor.description: Text color for the active sidebar item. Defaults to the primary color.

groupItems.description: Styling for group heading items in the sidebar.

level1Items.description: Styling for level 1 sidebar items such as tags and section headings.

arrow.description: Styling for the sidebar expand/collapse arrow.

SidebarItemOptions.description: Styling for a category of sidebar items.

activeBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the active state of this sidebar item group.

activeTextColor.description: Text color for the active state of this sidebar item group.

textTransform.description: CSS text-transform for sidebar item labels.

SidebarArrowOptions.description: Styling for the sidebar navigation arrow icon.

color.description: Color of the arrow icon. Defaults to the sidebar text color.

LogoOptions.description: Display settings for the logo shown above the sidebar.

maxHeight.description: Maximum height of the logo image. Defaults to the sidebar width.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width of the logo image. Defaults to the sidebar width.

RightPanelOptions.description: Styling options for the right panel, which shows request and response examples.

backgroundColor.description: Background color of the right panel.

width.description: Width of the right panel as a percentage or CSS value.

textColor.description: Text color in the right panel.

servers.description: Server selector overlay styling in the right panel.

RightPanelServersOptions.description: Styling for the server selector display in the right panel.

overlay.description: Overlay styling for the server selector.

backgroundColor.description: Background color of the server selector overlay.

textColor.description: Text color in the server selector overlay.

url.description: URL display styling in the server selector.

backgroundColor.description: Background color for the server URL display.

FabOptions.description: Styling options for the floating action button.

backgroundColor.description: Background color of the floating action button.

color.description: Icon color of the floating action button.
